prompt: A genuinely low-quality, grainy, black-and-white CCTV security camera still showing a {argument name="subject" default="classic grey alien with a large head and skinny body"} standing next to a gas pump at a {argument name="setting" default="deserted gas station at night"}. The gas pump has the word "UNLEADED" printed on the top canopy and a large number "2" on the side. In the bottom left corner, there is a digital timestamp overlay reading "{argument name="camera label" default="CAM 2"}", "{argument name="date" default="OCT 27 2004"}", and "12:04:16 AM" in a retro pixelated font. The overall aesthetic is authentic early-2000s surveillance footage with heavy noise, poor contrast, and VHS-style artifacts.
translatedPrompt: 一张画质粗糙、带有颗粒感的黑白 CCTV 安防监控静态图像，画面中显示一个 {argument name="subject" default="有着大头和瘦小身体的经典灰色外星人"} 正站在 {argument name="setting" default="深夜荒无人烟的加油站"} 的加油泵旁。加油泵顶部遮阳棚上印有“UNLEADED”字样，侧面有一个大大的数字“2”。左下角叠加了数字时间戳，显示为“{argument name="camera label" default="CAM 2"}”、“{argument name="date" default="OCT 27 2004"}”以及“12:04:16 AM”，字体采用复古像素风格。整体视觉效果呈现出 21 世纪初真实的监控录像质感，带有强烈的噪点、低对比度以及 VHS 风格的伪影。

breakdown.creativeCore: CCTV 安防监控录像：生成一张逼真的、低画质的黑白监控摄像头静态图像，支持自定义主体和时间戳。
breakdown.subject: 文字符号
breakdown.bestUse: 直播带货界面、社交电商、移动端商品页

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a UI/界面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: retro]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: camera]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
